_attestation_note: Three import errors caught and fixed: (1) Co-op end date was set to Jan 2026 — corrected to Dec 2025. (2) GPA for BMS Institute was imported as 8.3 — corrected to 8.35. (3) Power Automate was listed under Security Tools — moved to Automation & Scripting where it belongs.

education.institution: BMS Institute of Technology and Management

experience.title: Cybersecurity Analyst Co-op
responsibilities: Conducted vulnerability management using Tenable — scanning, prioritizing, and creating ServiceNow tickets for remediation
Authored patch memos and collaborated with IT staff via Microsoft Teams to clarify mitigation steps
Implemented a Jira-Tenable exception tracking workflow to improve visibility for extended remediation vulnerabilities
Investigated alerts using Recorded Future, Splunk, and Microsoft Defender — documented findings with analyst notes
Designed and maintained SharePoint documentation repositories including guides, standards, and Power Automate approval workflows
Authored playbooks and remediation reports to standardize alert response and operational workflows

projects.name: Human Risk Report Generator
projects.description: AI-powered pipeline built on Madison Framework SyntheticPersonas component. Analyzes 270 real cybersecurity records to generate tailored Human Risk Reports for any organization type. Deployed on Streamlit with Gemini 2.5 Flash.

projects.name: Smart Hydroponic Farm Management System
projects.description: SQL-based database for automated crop, harvest, order, and facility management with IoT sensor integration for environmental monitoring and anomaly detection.

projects.name: Hungry Bounce — Cloud Kitchen Ordering Website
projects.description: Fully functional web application for online food ordering with user authentication, order tracking, and secure database integration.

projects.name: Cloud Security Implementation
projects.description: IAM configurations, MFA, and encryption protocols for secure cloud environments. Vulnerability identification and mitigation across cloud infrastructure.

certifications.name: Certified in Cybersecurity (CC)
certifications.issuer: International Information System Security Certification Consortium (ISC2)
